subject: docs(cleanup): sync user docs with current UI labels; drop stale files
body:
doc-cleanup trigger pass:

- plan.md (root): Deleted. Described the imageCells → cellImages refactor
  which is long complete — only reference left is a comment in
  useAdState.js:661 documenting the concept's removal. Git history
  preserves the plan.

- README.md: "Structured" → "Guided" (UI label); Structure section now
  reflects Grid + Pages (removed stale "Text Alignment" — moved to
  Content tab); Style section now lists all five current sub-sections
  (Background, Color Tint, Frames, Spacing, Fonts) in UI order.

- docs/USER_GUIDE.md: "Structured Mode" → "Guided Mode"; added
  Background section; renamed Overlay → Color Tint and Typography →
  Fonts to match UI labels; split dedicated Frames section out of
  Spacing; removed duplicated "Zoom Background (1920×1080)" line.

- CLAUDE.md: test count 142 → 141 (reflects MIME_TYPES test removal
  from the prior commit); added cross-reference from config/platforms.js
  architecture line to docs/SOCIAL_MEDIA_SPECS.md (previously an
  orphaned reference doc, now discoverable from the code map).

- docs/TODO.md: test count 142 → 141, same reason.

- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: Rewrote — prior content described the
  delete-history-file branch work and was fully stale.

Tags: docs, readme, user-guide, session-notes, tidy
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: clean-sweep-2026-04
Semver: patch
